title: Marvell Technology Stock Overview and Earnings Analysis
text: Marvell Technology (MRVL) is a semiconductor company specializing in data center, networking, and storage solutions with strong exposure to AI infrastructure trends. The company reported fiscal 2026 full-year revenue of $8.195 billion, up 42% year-over-year, with data center revenue reaching $6.05 billion, up 46% year-over-year. Q4 FY2026 revenue was $2.22 billion with EPS of $0.80, both exceeding analyst expectations. The company expects FY2027 revenue to approach $11 billion, representing 35% year-over-year growth. FY2028 revenue is projected near $15 billion, representing 36% growth. Key growth drivers include custom silicon (doubling to $1.5 billion in fiscal 2026), optical interconnect products scaling to 800G and 1.6T, and data center Ethernet switching. Wall Street consensus is Strong Buy with analyst price targets ranging widely from $128 to $487, reflecting varied assumptions about the company's AI opportunity.
